programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye

programme.title: Sue Thomas F.B.Eye
programme.desc: After the FBI team's favorite waitress goes missing, Tara and Bobby discover she might have been involved with an Asian gang.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch, Ogden and Susannah narrowly escape after an explosion in London kills a woman.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch and Watts' efforts to protect a priceless ruby are thwarted by a determined thief.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch suspects a woman's death is tied to a corrupt mayoral candidate who may have gotten away with murder before.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Murdoch's investigation of a mysterious death may be linked to a new automat diner Higgins and Roberts have invested in.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: End Game
programme.desc: When Secret Service agent Alex Thomas (Cuba Gooding Jr.) acts too slowly to stop a crazed shooter, the president of the United States (Jack Scalia) is brutally shot in the middle of a press conference. In the wake of his death, journalist Kate Crawford (Angie Harmon) begins to suspect a massive conspiracy is afoot. Crawford convinces a skeptical Thomas to help her, and the two struggle to unravel the mystery behind the assassination -- before they become the next targets.

programme.title: Senior Moment
programme.desc: A retired NASA test pilot learns to navigate love and life again. Starring William Shatner and Jean Smart.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: When Sara (Elizabeth Hurley) is served divorce papers while she is in New York, she is stunned. Not about to lose the fortune she amassed with her self-serving Texan husband, she makes an offer to her process server, Joe (Matthew Perry), that sets them off on a wild trip across the country.

programme.title: The Exorcist III
programme.desc: A chilling sequel to the horror classic.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame To Kill For
programme.desc: Some of Sin City's most hard-boiled citizens cross paths with a few of its more reviled inhabitants.

programme.title: Serving Sara
programme.desc: A process server tries to serve an elusive female target.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: After personal and professional setbacks, a woman experiences an alternate reality.

programme.title: Man Of The Year
programme.desc: A comedian who hosts a news satire program decides to run for president, and a computerized voting machine malfunction gets him elected.

programme.title: Tortured
programme.desc: An undercover FBI agent faces a moral dilemma when he's asked to torture a member of one of the world's most powerful crime syndicates.

programme.title: The Shadow Riders
programme.desc: Two brothers return home at the end of the war to find their family has been kidnapped by Confederate forces.

programme.title: My Life
programme.desc: Michael Keaton is a young ad executive who discovers he is dying of cancer, just as he and his wife are expecting their first child. Deciding to make a video of his life as a gift for the child he may never know, he embarks on a journey of self discovery, confronting his painful past.

programme.title: Immediate Family
programme.desc: A married, childless couple decide to adopt from a pregnant teenage girl, who later gets second thoughts.

programme.title: The Long Gray Line
programme.desc: The prospect of a forced retirement prompts a longtime athletic trainer to recall how he became a West Point institution.

programme.title: American Madness
programme.desc: An idealistic banker battles the Great Depression, a conservative board of directors and a crooked executive's inside job in order to help his struggling customers.

programme.title: Murderers' Row
programme.desc: Matt Helm rescues the kidnapped inventor of an ultra-destructive "helio beam" capable of destroying Washington D.C.

programme.title: First Comes Courage
programme.desc: A Norwegian underground agent seeks valuable wartime intelligence by wooing a Nazi officer.

programme.title: White Zombie
programme.desc: A young man turns to a witch doctor to lure the woman he loves away from her fiancé, but instead turns her into a zombie slave.

programme.title: Sophie's Choice
programme.desc: Adapted from William Styron's best-selling novel, this passionate tale of a writer's love for a holocaust survivor is an exhilarating and compelling revelation. Screen favorite Meryl Streep received an Academy Award´ for her portrayal of Sophie Zawistowska in this penetrating drama set in post-World War II Brooklyn. Kevin Kline plays her all-consuming lover, Nathan.

programme.title: Phoenix
programme.desc: In Phoenix, Arizona, all is not well at the local police station as some of the colleagues are not good of heart. Superstitious cop Harry Collins is on the take. He a compulsive gambler who is forced to plan a heist with fellow cops Mike, James, and Fred to rip off local pimp and overall bad guy, Louie, to pay off gambling debts run up with "bookie" Chicago.

programme.title: Learning To Drive
programme.desc: As her marriage dissolves, a Manhattan writer takes driving lessons from a Sikh instructor with marriage troubles of his own. In each other's company they find the courage to get back on the road and the strength to take the wheel.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Kill Switch
programme.desc: A pilot battles to save his family and the planet after an experiment for unlimited energy goes wrong.

programme.title: Source Code
programme.desc: An army pilot must travel through time using the 'Source Code' in order to identify a ruthless bomber.

programme.title: Moonfall
programme.desc: A mysterious force knocks the moon from its orbit and sends it hurtling on a collision course toward earth.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 3
programme.desc: Two female survivors join forces to bring down the deadly group responsible for unleashing a hungry shark in a West Texas lake.

programme.title: Meteor: Day One
programme.desc: A quest begins to find an ancient dial that controls the skies.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: 12 To Midnight
programme.desc: A detective gets kicked off the force when the murder of his wife drives him to drink. When a new string of murders seem connected to her death, he soon finds himself squaring off against a killer who appears to be superhuman.

programme.title: Sword Master
programme.desc: A master swordsman must once again wield his weapon against those who threaten his desire to live in peace.

programme.title: The Emperor's Sword
programme.desc: After hiding a deadly sword that bestows great power upon its wielder, the emperor dies and a deranged rebel seizes power. Now, the young daughter of a great general is all that stands between a tyrant and his quest for domination.

programme.title: Fist of the Condor
programme.desc: A martial-arts master battles the world's greatest assassins to protect a sacred, ancient manual from falling into the wrong hands.

programme.title: The Final Master
programme.desc: With help from his apprentice (Song Yang), a Wing Chun practitioner (Liao Fan) must defeat eight martial arts academies before he can open his own school.

programme.title: Vengeance of an Assassin
programme.desc: An assassin escapes a battle and hides out in his childhood home. As he recovers, he realizes he has to fight faster and harder to survive.

programme.title: The Single's Guidebook
programme.desc: A content creator making a series about singlehood meets her match in polar-opposite, Jackson.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: At Home With Tori
programme.desc: Tori is hosting a 90210 themed party and wants to create some classic Beverly Hills appys.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: Snowman's Pass
programme.desc: Impresario aids fiancée in search for her fallen climber, masking his true goal: finding a spy satellite.

programme.title: Maternal Instinct
programme.desc: Teen witnesses mother's shooting, hides with a cop, facing danger as they evade the killer together.

programme.title: Call Her King
programme.desc: After sentencing a notorious gangster to death, Judge Jaeda King must rely on her wits, strength and skill when her courtroom is taken over by force by the prisoner's brother.

programme.title: Animal 2
programme.desc: James "Animal" Allen (Ving Rhames) took the fall for the crimes of his older son (Vicellous Shannon) and is now serving a life term at Folsom Prison. When his younger son, James Jr. (K.C. Collins), is framed for murder, Allen refuses to let two men from the same family submit to life imprisonment for crimes they didn't commit. When he learns that James Jr. was set up by someone at the prison, he resolves to win his son's freedom. To do this, he must return to his violent brawler roots.

programme.title: Shaka Zulu
programme.desc: A female captive tries to dissuade the African leader (Henry Cele) from waging war against white settlers.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: James must move in with his girlfriend of three months after being evicted from his place, and soon he discovers that he doesn't want to be with her anymore. His hope is to get her to break up with him but still let him sleep on the couch.

programme.title: Rule of Thirds
programme.desc: Monte Ashcroft, a world-class editorial photographer, finds love in a new muse-until a secret threatens to unravel everything.

programme.title: Tilt
programme.desc: When a local drug dealer is arrested and put in jail, he asks his daughter Diamond to run his operation. Diamond takes control of the empire, however it doesn’t sit well with members of the crew. Diamond gets word, from her trusted sources, that two members of the crew are plotting to overthrow her Father’s drug empire. Diamond must get rid of the two disloyal members of the crew before they take control of the operation.

programme.title: Aliens in the Hood
programme.desc: The hood politics of the neighborhood become even more complicated after the arrival of aliens! When one man in the neighborhood is blessed with superpowers, he and the other warring factions are headed to war over control of the current drug trade.

programme.title: Mistress for Hire
programme.desc: Skylar works as a professional mistress hired by women for divorce leverage. When she finds herself falling for her target, Eric, she questions her career and her motives. But when Eric’s wife, Octavia, won’t allow Skylar to destroy her plans, and a dangerous game of cat and mouse ensues, with love and survival on the line.

programme.title: Scandalous
programme.desc: Lady Watts, a bestselling author, reveals secrets about her affairs with those closest to her in her latest memoir. At her launch party, a heated argument turns violent, and she's left unconscious. As detectives investigate, secrets, love triangles, and betrayal emerge. The search for the attacker leads to twists and turns, involving everyone from her talent manager to her labelmate. The truth about the night of the attack is slowly revealed, with unexpected consequences for all involved.

programme.title: A Secret Lie in Love
programme.desc: Clarice and Chase Scott have the perfect suburban life on the outside. However, their marriage that was built on passion, has become a battlefield of deceit, infidelity, and betrayal. Clarice finds solace in the arms of another man, while Chase’s greed seems to unravel everything they’ve built. Will their marriage survive?

programme.title: 666: The Child
programme.desc: After a couple adopts a child, people near them suffer torturous deaths. The boy is the son of Satan.

programme.title: Halloween Night
programme.desc: Based on a true story, a man breaks free from an asylum on Halloween night and slaughters more victims.

programme.title: Dracula's Curse
programme.desc: A team of vampire hunters set out to battle an evil vampire clan in the dark underworld.

programme.title: Bad Girl
programme.desc: A problem teen tries to do right by her adoptive parents, until she meets the wrong girl.

programme.title: 500 MPH Storm
programme.desc: A scientist must get his family to safety before a "hypercane" wipes America off the map.

programme.title: Thankskilling 3 (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Fowl-mouthed villain Turkie carves through the likes of a rapping grandma, a mindless puppet, a wig-wearing inventor, a bisexual space worm.

programme.title: Little Dead Rotting Hood (Edited Version)
programme.desc: For years, the old woman in the woods has secretly kept the wolves of the forest at bay. But when the woman dies, the creatures suddenly attack the residents of a nearby small town. As more and more people turn up dead, the townsfolk discover something far more sinister than wolves lurking in the backwoods, and fight to save their home from evil by waging a bloody battle against the ruthless creatures. But as the wolves begin to overpower the town, only the womans granddaughter may have the key to stopping the bloodbath before its too late.

programme.title: Ankle Biters
programme.desc: Sean, a pro hockey enforcer, has fallen in love with Laura, a widowed mother of four young daughters. When Laura's children mistake an act of lovemaking as an attack, they plot to protect their mother at all costs and with horrific results.

programme.title: Thankskilling 3 (Edited Version)
programme.desc: Fowl-mouthed villain Turkie carves through the likes of a rapping grandma, a mindless puppet, a wig-wearing inventor, a bisexual space worm.

programme.title: Hell Night (Edited Version)
programme.desc: As an initiation rite into Alpha Sigma Rho fraternity, four pledges must spend a night in Garth Manor, twelve years to the day after the previous resident murdered his entire family. Two of the pledges, Marti, and Jeff ignore the rumors that the now-deserted mansion is haunted by a crazed killer, until one by one, members of their group mysteriously disappear. Could this be a part of a fraternity prank or is a demented former tenant seeking revenge?When this seemingly innocent night turns deadly, these college students will do anything to survive Hell Night. Directed by genre filmmaker Tom DeSimone (Reform School Girls, Angel III: The Final Chapter), this slasher classic has a talented young cast including Linda Blair (The Exorcist), Vincent Van Patten (Rock N Roll High School), Peter Barton (Friday The 13th: The Final Chapter) and Kevin Brophy (The Seduction).

programme.title: La Llorona
programme.desc: La Llorona

programme.title: Come True
programme.desc: Looking for an escape from her recurring nightmares, 18-year-old Sarah submits to a university sleep study, but soon realizes she's become the conduit to a frightening new discovery.

programme.title: Son
programme.desc: When a young boy falls ill to a mysterious illness, his mother must decide how far she will go to protect him from terrifying forces in her past.

programme.title: The Vigil
programme.desc: Called to stand watch overnight to a deceased member of his former Orthodox Jewish community, a young man comes to feel an inescapable supernatural presence in the house.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: A man looking to debunk a series of paranormal events falls into a world of terror. Martin Freeman stars in a tale that will haunt your dreams.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Giant Jackrabbit" - Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California, like diving suits and a boat, and a television set, which Granny thinks is some kind of fancy washing machine.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Get Culture" - The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Garden Party" - Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake. They end up back by their 'cement pond' to handle the 'overflow' from Mrs. Drysdale's party. A gun shot by Granny starts the real party.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Go Hollywood" - When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: The Texas Rangers
programme.desc: Carver, the fastest gun in the West, leads his men in pursuit of the notorious Sam Bass gang.

programme.title: Fugitive of the Plains
programme.desc: In this continuation of the much loved Billy the Kid serials featuring dreamboat Buster Crabbe (perhaps best known for his numerous appearances as Flash Gordon in the 30s and 40s), Billy finds himself joining an outlaw band led by women in order to, once again, clear his name after being wrongly accused of a crime he did not commit. Helmed by famed B-movie director Sam Newfield, this film also features Al St. John, whose lovable Fuzzy character was as essential to the PRC's Billy the Kid series as Billy himself.

programme.title: Revenge of the Virgins (Edited Version)
programme.desc: The angry and topless female members of a Native American prepare for battle when white treasure hunters move in on their sacred ground. Peter Perry Jr. (The Secret Sex Lives of Romeo and Juliet) directed this early nudie-cutie from a script by legendary cult filmmaker Ed Wood (Plan Nine from Outer Space). Writing under the pen name Peter LaRoche, Wood churned out this screenplay just before he reinvented himself as the author of seedy adult novels.

programme.title: Broadway to Cheyenne
programme.desc: A gang of big-city thugs trying to set up a protection racket out west meet their match in this B-Western from Hollywoods Poverty Row. Rex Bell, billed on the old print ads as The heroic idol of young America! stars as Breezy Kildare, a New York detective who happens to be in Wyoming. When Breezy leads a group of cattleman against the well-armed city boys, the bad guys will wish theyd stayed in New York! The rest of the cast includes such favorites from the period as George Gabby Hayes, Roy DArcy, and Marceline Day. (Day worked opposite everyone from John Wayne to Buster Keaton, but retired from acting shortly after this movie at age 25.) Directed by Harry L. Fraser.

programme.title: The Dude Ranger
programme.desc: Its nothing but action and thrills when an Easterner inherits a cattle ranch and discovers that thousands of cattle have been stolen. Secretly, he signs on as a hired hand at his own ranch to uncover the thief. Once he realizes whats going on, the city boy becomes a hard-riding, avenging son of a six- shooter! Directed by Edward F. Cline from a story by Zane Grey, the film stars George OBrien, Irene Hervey, and LeRoy Mason.

programme.title: Young Buffalo Bill
programme.desc: Roy Rogers stars in this highly fictionalized account of Bill Cody's life from director Joseph Kane (Dakota, Flame of Barbary Coast). What it lacks in accuracy is made up for with adventure, as well as and some of Roy's great cowboy songs, including 'Blow Breeze Blow', and 'Rollin' Down to Santa Fe'. Other stars include George 'Gabby' Hayes, Chief Thundercloud, and the lovely Pauline Moore (Young Mr. Lincoln, Charlie Chan at Treasure Island)

programme.title: Down Texas Way
programme.desc: The sixth film in Monogram's Rough Rider series once again follows Buck Roberts (Buck Jones), Tom McCoy (Tim McCall), and Sandy Hopkins (Raymond Hatton) as undercover US Marshals posing as outlaws in order to confound their enemies. When Sandy is framed for murder by a gang of frontier racketeers who hope to take over a small town as their headquarters, Buck and Tom must work separately to save their buddy from a lynch mob and foil the crook's dastardly schemes.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: Grand Canyon Trail
programme.desc: Roy Rogers and Trigger star in this Republic Pictures feature about the hunt for silver in a deserted ghost town. Songs include 'Colorado Joe' and 'Everything's Going My Way'. Plus, look for Andy Devine as Cookie Bullfincher. Film buffs should look for silent screen foil James Finlayson, a familiar face from various Keystone Cop comedies, as the local sheriff.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Tries the UK’s Secret Race Track!
programme.desc: The Hammond's love the Lake District, but there has been an entire petrolhead paradise hiding in plain sight for years, just over the valley from their house in Buttermere. Richard and Izzy test out the epic race track at M-Sport, a facility designed specifically to develop the latest breed of WRC cars.

programme.title: We Drove the £3 Public Rally Stage (that anyone can go to)
programme.desc: Ben & Mike take two legendary road rally cars on a short road trip from Collins’ Farm to Porlock Hill, a public toll road that doubles as a Tarmac rally stage at certain times of the year. Paying £3 per drive, Ben and Mike thrash their cars up and down the hill to test their cars rally credentials, the road and their own driving skills.

programme.title: Ex-Stig THRASHES The New 911 GT3 RS Around The Top Gear Track!
programme.desc: The 992 911 GT3 RS is arguably Porsche's greatest performance car ever, but what does Ben Collins make of it? We hired Dunsfold Aerodrome (the Top Gear test track), threw Ben the keys to the RS and let him loose to explore the limits of this racecar in roadcar clothing.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Thrashes a £140,000 700bhp Supercharged Defender!
programme.desc: Richard owns a Land Rover Defender, and he thought his was cool with its Bowler bits and ORE 4x4 mods. But after hosting a Land Rover meet at The Smallest Cog, he realises there are levels to the Landy game. With Thruxton circuit all to himself, he samples the insane IRB Developments LS3 Defender, doing things that he didn’t think were possible for an old Land Rover.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond's Supercharged Mini Is Dead! (So She Fitted a £12,000 Upgraded Engine)
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond's Mini was built to be a track weapon, but it seems the engine was pushed that bit too far. Thanks to the guys at Lohen Mini, Stanley the Cooper S now has an even punchier engine!

programme.title: Richard Hammond Drives the GT3-Engined Boxster, and He's FURIOUS
programme.desc: Richard Hammond loves a Porsche, and the new Boxster Spyder RS is up there with the best. Finding a spare slot in his calendar, we threw him the keys to the 9000rpm animal around Thruxton circuit to see if this Boxster is the best of the bunch.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Challenged His Daughter Off-Road! – CHEAP Range Rovers
programme.desc: Richard challenges Izzy and the rest of Range Rover Club to navigate an off-roading route in their cheap Rangies, with the prize being a bunch of modifications to take their cars to the next level.

programme.title: We Stripped BMW’s Worst Modern Engine To See Why It’s So Bad
programme.desc: Mike travels to visit the main BMW breakers yard in the country to investigate a BMW engine that keeps catastrophically failing – the B47 four-cylinder turbo. With a serious timing gear design flaw, Mike and breaker Ashley dismantle an engine that has failed and find the damage caused by the flaw.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Goes Performance Car Shopping!
programme.desc: Having daily driven a bog standard Mercedes A-Class for a few years, it's time for Izzy Hammond to upgrade. With the help of Lewis from the smallest Cog, she sets out to test the latest batch of German performance cars to see which one takes her fancy.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond Modifies Her £800 Range Rover!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond combines with ORE 4x4 to upgrade her £800 Range Rover, Lizzy. Installing parts that are worth much more than the car itself, Izzy's L322 should be ready for some serious off-roading down the line.

programme.title: I Drove A Bugatti Veyron As My Daily For 12 hours! – It Was STRESSFUL
programme.desc: Mike Fernie is thrown the keys to his childhood dream hypercar, the 253mph Bugatti Veyron. Instead of doing the obvious things like driving it down a runway or racing a plane, he uses it as a genuine daily, completing mundane tasks like a garden centre trip and a Halfords run, before taking it to some country roads to see how quick it really is.

programme.title: Izzy Hammond has bought her first performance car!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond has bought her first hot hatch, and she's gone big! Trading in her Mercedes A180, she has now taken the leap into the world of being a true petrolhead.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought a £500 BMW 3 Series – We Investigated Why!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie and Isaac from The Smallest Cog have been given permission to rummage around the back of Richard Hammond's secret barn, digging out entire cars and numerous TV artefacts from down the years.

programme.title: The 10-cylinder BMW that no one knows about – *W10* BMW M5!
programme.desc: Mike Fernie has searched out a truly one-of-one BMW. Used as a prototype for Volkswagen to test a W10 engine that never made it to production, this quirky E39 M5 is as weird as cars get. Mike dives into the car's engineering, as well as luckily being able to take it for a spin to understand what a W10 is all about.

programme.title: Can Richard Hammond Build a Car in 48 Hours
programme.desc: Richard and Izzy Hammond have one weekend to build an entire car! Starting with an exploded kit of a Caterham Academy racecar, father and daughter combine forces to build the whole car and drive it out of the workshop before the mechanics from The Smallest Cog need their garage back.

programme.title: Richard Hammond reunites with his first bike: The Honda MTX
programme.desc: Richard Hammond reunites with his 17-year-old self in this massive nostalgia hit. Firstly listening to his old radio tapes from the 1990s, he then takes a step back even further to 1985, when he bought his first ever vehicle – a Honda MTX motorbike. Richard regales the story of his petrolhead origin, taking him back 40 years, well before the glory days of The Grand Tour and Top Gear.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Reveals What It Was Like Reuniting With James May at Top Gear HQ
programme.desc: Mike Fernie spices up a Q&A with Richard Hammond by challenging him to game of (Top Gear-themed) Top Trumps. Mike particularly questions Richard on his recent meet-up with former Top Gear presenter James May at Dunsfold Aerodrome, the place where the trio presented the show for 15 years.

programme.title: We Found The Biggest Range Rover Graveyard In The World
programme.desc: Mike & Isaac travel into the wilds of Wales to scavenge for parts for Range Rover Club. Road-tripping in Isaac’s newly-acquired Range Rover Sport and Mike’s Rover MG ZS180, they arrive to the breaker’s yard with a shopping list of parts to help keep the three DT cheap Range Rovers on the road. But they find an astonishing array of Range Rover literally being swallowed up by the ground.

programme.title: Richard Hammond Drives the New BMW M5 Touring - And He's NOT a Fan
programme.desc: This is the first BMW M5 Richard Hammond has driven since our beloved V10 E61 M5 Touring, so does the 700+bhp hybrid super estate live up to the hype?

programme.title: Cheap vs expensive SUV - Range Rover edition!
programme.desc: Izzy Hammond, Tati Reed (OverInTheRover) and Range Rover Club combine to compare Izzy's £800 L322 against a brand new £100,000 top spec Range Rover. Tackling off-road, tug-of-war and sheer popularity challenges, which mighty Range Rover will come out on top?

programme.title: Richard Hammond commutes to work in our new 700hp Dodge Charger Hellcat!
programme.desc: With the DriveTribe Dodge Charger Hellcat settling in nicely with our team, Mike decided the boss deserved a go. Richard Hammond thought it would be fitting to use the 707hp supercharged animal to commute from his house to the Smallest Cog, because who wouldn't want to drive to work in a 6.2-litre hemi-powered monster?

programme.title: Richard Hammond brings an E46 BMW M3 to the Smallest Cog! Ft. @MatArmstrongbmx
programme.desc: We all love a future classic, and it doesn't get much better than the stunning BMW E46 M3. In this new series that we're kicking off, we invited YouTuber Mat Armstrong to the Smallest Cog to have his car checked over by Mike and Anthony, and have a chat with Richard. Here's how it went!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to the second day in Quebec. The athletes are fighting hard to win this two-day event. The last points of this SCL stage can be won over four outstanding disciplines: Power Stairs, Dumbbell Press, Keg Toss, and finally, the legendary Farmer’s Walk. Who will leave Canada with the yellow ‘Leader Shirt’?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Stages 8 and 9 of the SCL are hosted in Vaasa, Finland, taking place over a spectacular two-day event. After 3 wins so far, Matjaz Belsak from Slovenia plans to extend his lead at the top of the table. Among the other 13 highly motivated strongmen, two SCL legends will make their comeback to the competition: Former World Champion of 2015, Krzysztof Radzikowski (Poland) and Dainis Zageris (Latvia).

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: The fight for the Finnish trophy continues. In this unmissable SCL event, the strongmen battle for the win in the Carry and Drag, the Forward Hold, Deadlifting with Cars and the Loading Race. Belsak, Radzikowski and Zageris look good after the first day, but the others haven’t given up yet.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: This under 105kg category event is the ultimate preparation for up-and-coming strongman athletes before entering the heavy class. The Lightweight World Championship is a special every year in the SCL calendar as it sees new talents rise and many promising athletes who are gearing up for future tournaments. A total of 25 athletes from 16 different countries make their way to Kokkola, Finland

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Situated in the very heart of the Carpathian Mountains, Sibiu is a Romanian town where the climate is pleasantly mild, offering some of the best weather conditions for a strongman event around Europe. All this, without doubt, set the mood for the high results and showtime vibes in Stage 11 of Strongman Champions League. The competition in Sibiu was organized in six different disciplines

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: From now on every stage of these series will be more than crucial. Curacao is a beautiful Dutch island in the Caribbean, with a great atmosphere to hold another stage of the MLO Strongman Champions League. Let’s see who takes the title here and who will secure a place in the next stage.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Ten of the world’s strongest men gathered in Amman to compete in Jordan’s first-ever Truck-Pull Championship. The contestants race against the clock while pulling a 21-ton truck across the track. One of the most fierce competitors to take part in the event was four-time winner of the World’s Strongest Man competition, Brian Shaw.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Taking place in Corinth, Greece, considered by many the cradle of the sports competition games, an epic strongman battle will mark the last stage before the upcoming big two-day season’s finale in Chetumal, Mexico. In front of more than 5000 spectators, the twelve athletes compete in Log Lifts, Card Deadlift, Conan’s Wheel and Loading.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Usually, smoking requires time and patience. But what if you could achieve great smoke flavor in 5 to 10 minutes? From steak to cocktails, learn how to smoke in a snap.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue originated in the Caribbean with a Taino Indian smoker-grill called a barbacoa. Explore barbecue's tropical roots with a tour of the Caribbean, from the French West Indies to Mexico.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Everyone loves a cocktail party—especially when you infuse the menu with the intoxicating aroma of wood smoke. Check out these smokehouse recipes inspired by the world's diverse cuisines from Spain to Australia and exploding with unique flavors.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Good things may come in small packages, but when it comes to barbecue, bigger is better. Learn to think (and smoke) big with oversized cuts of meat, a whole suckling pig, and an epic dessert.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane visits a famous local marble sculptor en route to visit an old friend and great cook, where she learns the secrets of pinched sweet cheese cakes, ancient sesame-honey confections and more. Back in her own kitchen, she creates a luscious Tinos-style artichoke bread pudding and red mullet in caper sauce, both Tinos traditional specialties.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: On Mykonos, Diane discovers the quiet life and food of its local farmers, in contrast to the reputation as a dazzling party island. She tastes onion pie, delicious cured pork, and one of the oldest cheeses in the world, kopanisti, still made on the island. In the kitchen, she makes a garlicky local pasta recipe, and a traditional Greek island fish soup.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Gorgeous cafes, bustling nightlife, yachting and water sports, just 20 minutes south of the Greek capital, Athens. Diane visits a fish market where the catch is right off the boat, sails the coast, and returns to her kitchen to create three delicious, contemporary Greek recipes, inspired by the cosmopolitan bustle and fun-loving spirit of the Athenian coast.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane and friend and ultramarathoner, Dean Karnazes, meet up for a run. He helps Diane hone her technique, sharing healthy eating tips. Together they make a simple Greek salad with local ingredients and enjoy perfect Mediterranean living. Back in her kitchen, Diane cooks up a very healthy plant-forward Messinian meal, with lots of olive oil, beans and greens.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores everything from beguiling mastiha, to the local pasta to unique tomatoes, dangling like giant rubies against the renowned geometric patterns on medieval houses of Pyrgi. The flavors of historic Chios inspire her to cook up a succulent chicken and quince dish and an easy traditional black eyed pea salad with Mastiha vinaigrette.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Naxos is famed for the quality of its meats, its array of cow's milk and sheep-and-goats' milk cheeses and for its potatoes. Diane heads from the shore straight to a remote mountain hideaway with Alexis in tow, where two local cooks await them with a feast of stuffed lamb, potatoes, and a unique skillet pumpkin-onion pie.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Near the historic Bay of Navarino, blanketed by olive, citrus trees and home to historical culinary artifacts unearthed in prehistoric clay tablets at Pylos, Diane cooks with two village ladies, making a local pork and fig dish, and olive-oil fried bread. Inspired by the cornucopia of olive oil, oranges and other local delicacies, she cooks up a Messinian meal.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: The second-largest Greek island and an hour from Athens, Diane heads out in search of mushrooms with a local mushroom forager and cultivator. They cook a favorite local recipe "kritharoto," mushrooms with orzo. Diane makes three delectable dishes with mushrooms, wine and local ingrediants, inspired by the flavors of this nearby "secret" land.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane explores the rich, cuisine of Corfu, a mixture of Greek, Italian, French and others. A local cook makes a Venetian soffrito, and orange salad. In the market: Corfu's famous kumquats, ouzo-infused figs, local fish. Diane cooks up mixed braised greens with feta, an Italian fish stew called bourtheto and Venetian pastitsio, reworked for the modern cook.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.desc: While playing in the caboose, BJ is surprised to learn that The Land of Mother Goose truly exists. BJ and Baby Bop hope to visit them soon. When Baby Bop catches Barney, BJ, Riff and some children wrapping a mysterious present in the caboose, she just cant wait to see what is in the box. programme.desc: Baby Bop isnt satisfied with the things she can do. She wants to play the keyboard like Riff and wants to be able to skate like Barney. When a wheelchair-bound child is unintentionally neglected by his friends, Barney steps in to help. He gently reminds the others to include the child by showing them that even Barney feels excluded sometimes. It isnt always easy being a big, purple dinosaur. In the end, everyone is included for a day of fun!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Jamal has never danced before and is too shy to try. On the day of the big dance party in the park, Barney and his friends introduce Jamal to many kinds of dance. Barney assures Jamal that he can do anything he puts his mind to even dance. With Barneys help, Jamal finally finds his groove and has fun dancing with his friends! Barney tells Baby Bop the story of The Princess Without a Song to Sing. In this original fairytale, Baby Bop imagines herself as the sad little princess trying to find her unique song. Barney, BJ and Riff all become characters in the story, each sharing their songs and revealing an element of song, sound, rhythm and feeling. With their help, the princess finds her song and is delighted to sing it for her friends!

programme.title: Barney and Friends
programme.desc: Riff cant find his drumsticks anywhere. He knows he had them when he visited various neighborhood locations with Barney earlier in the day. Barney magically recreates neighborhood spots to help refresh Riffs memory. Happily, Barneys strategy is a success and Riff finds his drumsticks. Along the way, everyone learns that the most important part of a neighborhood is the people who live there! Barney helps Baby Bop explore many different jobs. At the end of the day, Baby Bop has several different careers to consider for when she grows up. But for now, shes happy just being three!

programme.title: We Hold These Truths: The Global Quest for Liberty
programme.desc: This lively documentary explores the promise and global influence of Americas expression of freedom, the Declaration of Independence. Since 1776, more than 100 nations have declared their independence, modeling their declarations on Americas. From Vietnam to Venezuela, from Prague to Hong Kong, millions of lives have been touched by the ideals written in this enduring document. Host Douglas Ginsburg, Federal Judge on the U.S. Court of Appeals, D.C. Circuit, interviews leading experts and ordinary citizens from around the world. In Paris, at the Palace of Versailles, he meets a descendant of the Marquis de Lafayette. In Prague, he tours a cold war bunker and learns that the Czech Republic's journey toward independence mirrors the three great waves of independence that swept the world in the twentieth century. He meets immigrants from Hong Kong, Venezuela, and Vietnam, all seeking the ideals of Life, Liberty and the Pursuit of Happiness. In the United States, Judge Ginsburg travels from Philadelphia to Baltimore to New York and beyond to learn how the words of the Declaration influenced the abolitionist movement, the Women's Suffrage movement, and iconic civil rights figures like Frederick Douglass and Dr. Martin Luther King, Jr. WE HOLD THESE TRUTHS is a revealing and fascinating look at this extraordinary and enduring document.

programme.title: Landslide: A Portrait of President Herbert Hoover
programme.desc: Herbert Hoover was a politician and a humanitarian whose legacy has been largely defined by the Great Depression. When he was elected president in a landslide victory in 1928, Hoover had never before held public office. Even so, his humanitarian work and career as a mining engineer, businessman and U.S. Secretary of Commerce carried him to a win. When the stock market crashed on October 29, 1929, Hoovers agenda was derailed by the worsening economic crisis. Despite various efforts to pull the nation out of depression, Hoovers unsuccessful attempts led to his sound defeat by Franklin Roosevelt just four years after his landslide victory. LANDSLIDE looks at the life of the controversial figure through interviews with notable historians and Hoover scholars.The program explores the facts and fictions behind the presidency of Herbert Hoover including The Great Depression and the role of the Federal Reserve. Hoovers early life in Iowa and abroad, the international experiences that led to his decision to run for office, his presidency and political philosophy, and the lasting impacts of his policy decisions during and after the depression are revealed. Through interviews with notable scholars such as David Kennedy, Amity Shlaes, Robert Reich, Tim Egan and Timothy Walch, this biography sheds new light on Hoovers difficult tenure and enduring legacy.

programme.title: Elvis and the USS Arizona
programme.desc: ELVIS AND THE USS ARIZONA tells the surprising story of how one of music's biggest icons helped to establish a USS Arizona memorial in Pearl Harbor.In the late 1950s, the USS Arizona Memorial Commission was struggling to raise money for a permanent memorial to honor the 1,177 crewmen who lost their lives aboard the battleship on December 7, 1941. After a successful fundraising push, momentum had slowed, and though construction on the approved design was underway, only half of the necessary funds had been raised.Recently honorably discharged from the U.S. Army and headed to Hawaii to begin filming Blue Hawaii, Elvis was presented by his manager to the idea of a benefit concert to support the memorial fund. He agreed without hesitation and on March 25, 1961, performed to a sold-out crowd at the Bloch arena on the naval base. Elvis concert would draw public attention to the plight and help galvanize efforts to finish the USS Arizona Memorial as it still stands today.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: ABOVE AND BEYOND highlights one of the most compelling escape and survival stories from World War II that of former Rhode Island Governor Bruce Sundlun (1920-2011). Sundlun, a U.S. Army Air Corps pilot, flew a B-17 bomber nicknamed the Damn Yankee on a dozen combat missions during World War II. On December 1, 1943, Sundlun's unlucky 13th mission would take him (a Jewish-American) and his crew into Hitler's backyard the heart of Germany's industrial Ruhr Valley. While on the mission, the bomber drew heavy fire from German fighter planes and crashed in a field in the Nazi-occupied Belgian town of Jabbeke. By nightfall, Sundlun remained the only member of his 10-man crew not killed or captured by the Germans. Muddied and bloodied, Sundlun eluded the Germans by hiding in plain sight face down between a row of crops. He soon found refuge in a local farmhouse, his wounds tended by a local family. For the next several days, courageous Catholic priests and local members of the French Resistance sheltered Sundlun and provided him with fake identity papers. With help from a vast underground network, Bruce fled to occupied France, where he joined the Resistance (under the code name Salamander) and assisted them in their fight against the Nazis. Eventually smuggled into neutral Switzerland, Sundlun would spy for the U.S. Office of Strategic Services (OSS), the precursor to the CIA, tasked with communicating with French Resistance and German officers looking to surrender.The documentary unfolds as Sundlun's daughter Kara retraces his wartime journey. In Jabbeke, Kara meets author and local historian Luc Packo, as well as witnesses to her father's plane crash, who still celebrate Sundlun's contribution to their country's liberation.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Welcome to the magical world of a clockmaker, where the gears are lovingly handmade and time truly does stand still as host Eric Gorges and young clock maker Nate Bowers create a beautiful exposed gear clock.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: The century old tradition of building the Windsor chair is a practical and elegant pursuit. Host Eric Gorges and master craftsman Curtis Buchanan give the viewer a front seat.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Master weaver Jaunita Hofstrom wanted to have a place just for weavers to gather and pursue their love of weaving. She bought a little church around the corner from her house and started living that dream. Host Eric Gorges explores the ins and outs and up and overs of this traditional craft.

programme.title: A Craftsman's Legacy
programme.desc: Cheese, please! Join master cheesemaker Bruce Workman and host Eric Gorges for an inside view of an award winning creamery. Who knew master cheesemakers started their day at 2am?!
